'''Mon Calamari Nerveshock''' was a fatal [[Disease/Legends|disease]] that affected [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. One in three cases of the disease were fatal. It could remain dormant in its host for several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] as the host aged. When it finally became active, it was already too late to save the victim. Rapid degeneration of the [[nervous system]] was the primary result of the virus, which eventually left the Mon Calamari unable to survive. For these reasons, all Mon Calamari children were immunized against it.<ref name="TLCSB" />

[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Sesfan/Legends|Sesfan]], a member of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] staff, was tested for Mon Calamari Nerveshock. His tests came back showing he was fit for duty.<ref name="TLCSB" />
